headline: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was found uploading users' codebases. Data was reportedly sent to Google Cloud without user consent. The company disabled the feature after the discovery was published.

headline: Philips Hue’s budget-friendly Essential starter kit has hit a new low price
summary: Philips Hue's Essential starter kit has reached an all-time low price. The bundle includes four smart bulbs and a Hue Bridge. This deal is among remaining post-Prime Day smart lighting sales.

headline: Plex problems prevented users from streaming movies and shows
summary: Plex services experienced major issues, preventing users from streaming. Many reported problems accessing their locally hosted content. The widespread outage affected users across various platforms on Tuesday.

headline: Nintendo’s Switch 2 bundle that includes a game is $50 off
summary: The Nintendo Switch 2 console bundle is currently available with a $50 discount. This rare deal includes a choice of digital games like Mario Kart World. The bundle typically retails for $499.99.

headline: Microsoft Deletes User's 25-Year-Old Account With Thousands Spent on Games and His Son's Baby Pictures After It Was Hacked
summary: A Microsoft user lost his 25-year-old account after it was hacked. The deleted account contained thousands spent on games and personal photos. This resulted in the loss of his entire digital history.

headline: Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus & Core Ultra 5 250K Plus Review
summary: An in-depth review of Intel's new Core Ultra 7 270K Plus processor is presented. The article also covers the performance of the Core Ultra 5 250K Plus. It provides analysis for the latest additions to Intel's CPU lineup.

headline: Steam’s Record-Breaking $11 Billion Profit in First Half of 2026 Was Funded Mostly by Older Games
summary: Steam achieved a record $11 billion profit in the first half of 2026. This historic financial success was primarily driven by sales of older games. It marks the platform's most profitable period in its 22-year history.

headline: Magic: The Gathering's Star Trek Expansion Is Available to Preorder Now
summary: Magic: The Gathering has announced a new Star Trek themed expansion. The Universes Beyond set is now available for preorder. This expansion brings iconic Star Trek characters and lore to the card game.

headline: Police say Ann Widdecombe killed in 'targeted attack' as motive investigated
summary: Police are investigating Ann Widdecombe's death as a 'targeted attack.' A 28-year-old suspect has been detained for up to seven days. The motive behind the killing is currently under intense investigation.

headline: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US resumes blockade of Iran ports
summary: Trump withdrew his threat of a 20% fee on cargo ships using the Strait of Hormuz. The US has resumed its blockade of Iranian ports. This continues the US effort to challenge Iran's control over the waterway.

headline: Starmer and Burnham hail Hillsborough Law as MPs give approval
summary: MPs have approved the Hillsborough Law, garnering praise from Starmer and Burnham. The legislation cleared the House of Commons during Sir Keir Starmer's final days as prime minister. This marks a significant moment for justice related to the Hillsborough disaster.

headline: Scott Mills was highest-paid BBC star before sacking
summary: Scott Mills was the BBC's highest-paid star prior to his recent sacking. He earned approximately £745,000 from the BBC in the last financial year. Mills was previously known for hosting the Radio 2 breakfast show.
